observation: When input length p95 < 2000 chars AND schema has <=5 fields, claude-haiku-4-5 reaches >=0.85 precision in 80% of trials. Sonnet adds <2pt at 3x cost.
Multi-hop questions (tag 'multi_hop') show 12-18pt judge_score lift on Sonnet vs Haiku. Single-hop shows <3pt. Route per-case if cost is tight.
For support-style chat with p95 latency budget <=3s, Haiku is the only viable model at v0.1 cost tier — Sonnet p95 routinely exceeds 4s on >800-token contexts.
